name: Mississippi Mud Cake 3
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Miniature marshmallows OR Large marshmallows cut into 1/2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. To prepare the cake batter, combine the butter and sugar in a mixing bowl. Beat well until creamy.
3. Add the eggs, one at a time, beating thoroughly after each addition.
4. Sift together the flour and cocoa powder. Fold this into the creamed mixture.
5. Add the chopped nuts and vanilla. Beat well.
6. Butter the bottom and sides of a 9 X 13 inch baking pan. Add a little flour and shake it around to coat the bottom and sides of the pan. Shake out the excess.
7. Spoon the cake batter into the pan and bake for 25 to 30 minutes.
8. Remove from the oven and sprinkle the top with the marshmallows. Return to the oven and bake about 10 more minutes, until the marshmallows are melted and starting to brown.
9. Remove from the oven and let cool in the pan for about 30 minutes.
10. Meanwhile, prepare the icing by melting the butter in a saucepan.
11. Sift together the confectioner's sugar and cocoa powder. Stir this into the butter along with the nuts and evaporated milk.
12. Spread the icing over the cake and let stand until thoroughly cooled.
13. Cut into slices and serve.
